items.name: BBQ Smoked Brisket on a Kaiser
items.description: Impress your guests with our "AAA" Alberta beef brisket! It's smoked low and slow over apple and cherry woods, carved on-site, and served on a freshly baked Kaiser. This meal is served with freshly tossed creamy coleslaw, delicious oven-baked brown beans, and our House and Bama BBQ sauces on the side. Included at no charge: paper plates, napkins, compostable cutlery, serving staff, and clean-up.
items.simplified_description: Smoked Alberta beef brisket on a Kaiser with coleslaw, baked beans, and BBQ sauces.

items.name: BBQ Pulled Pork on a Kaiser
items.description: Pulled Pork simmered in our house BBQ sauce and generously served on a freshly baked Kaiser. This meal is accompanied by our delicious oven-baked brown beans, freshly tossed creamy coleslaw, and assorted house-made BBQ sauces on the side. Paper plates, napkins, compostable cutlery, serving staff, and clean-up are all included at no additional charge.
items.simplified_description: Pulled pork on a Kaiser with coleslaw, baked beans, and BBQ sauces on the side.

items.name: Traditional Smokehouse Catering
items.description: _**Enjoy a traditional Smokehouse meal with your choice of one, two, or three types of smoked meat:**_ * **Beef Brisket** * **Pulled Pork** * **Chicken Breast** This meal includes jalapeno cheddar cornbread muffins, oven-baked brown beans, freshly tossed coleslaw, and oven-roasted BBQ potatoes with butter, sour cream, and fresh chives. Extra hot horseradish and our house-made BBQ sauces are served on the side. Meals are served to your guests buffet-style. Includes china service and stainless cutlery, and staff to handle the set-up, serving, and clean-up.
items.simplified_description: Choice of smoked meats with sides including cornbread, beans, coleslaw, and BBQ potatoes.
items.other_info: Buffet-style with serving staff; spicy horseradish on side

items.name: BBQ Beef on a Kaiser
items.description: An ALL BEEF favourite! Thinly sliced "AAA" Alberta Beef, slowly simmered in premium BULL'S-EYE BBQ SAUCE and generously served on a freshly baked Kaiser. This meal is served with our creamy coleslaw and delicious oven-baked brown beans. Included at no charge: paper plates, napkins, compostable cutlery, serving staff, and clean-up.
items.simplified_description: Sliced Alberta beef in BBQ sauce on a Kaiser with coleslaw and baked beans.

items.name: BBQ Hamburger Meal
items.description: A 6oz. 100% Prime Rib burger on a freshly baked Kaiser. Lettuce, tomato, onion, real cheddar cheese, and condiments are served on the side so you can dress it up your way! This meal is served with creamy coleslaw and our special recipe classic potato salad. Our staff will serve your guests buffet-style and will handle the set-up and clean-up as well. The price also includes paper plates, napkins, and compostable cutlery.
items.simplified_description: Prime rib burger on a Kaiser with sides of coleslaw and potato salad.

items.name: BBQ Steak Meal
items.description: ”AAA” Alberta sirloin steak, lightly seasoned and grilled to perfection on-site. This meal is served with creamy coleslaw, our special recipe oven-baked brown beans, freshly baked dinner buns, and extra hot horseradish that will leave your mouth watering. This meal is served with creamy coleslaw, Caesar salad, and potato salad that will leave your mouth watering. The staff for serving and clean-up, paper plates, napkins, and compostable cutlery are all included at no additional charge.
items.simplified_description: Grilled Alberta sirloin steak with coleslaw, baked beans, salads, and dinner buns.
items.other_info: Includes spicy horseradish and buffet service

items.name: Roast Beef Dinners
items.description: Enjoy either of our Roast Beef Dinners below for  $32.95 per person ### **Traditional Roast Beef Dinner** All-you-can-eat "AAA” Alberta beef, carefully aged and slowly roasted to perfection. This dinner is served with freshly tossed creamy coleslaw, baked potatoes with butter, sour cream, and fresh chives, honey-glazed carrots, freshly baked dinner buns, au jus, and extra hot horseradish. Our professional staff will serve your guests buffet-style on China plates. We include stainless cutlery and clean-up at no additional cost. ### **BBQ Roast Beef Dinner** All-you-can-eat "AAA” Alberta beef, slowly roasted and basted with premium BULL’S-EYE BBQ SAUCE that will have you coming back for more. Served with creamy coleslaw, baked potatoes with butter, sour cream, and fresh chives, our special recipe oven-baked brown beans, freshly baked dinner buns, and extra hot horseradish that will leave your mouth watering. Our professional staff will serve your guests buffet-style. We include China plates, stainless cutlery, and clean-up at no additional cost.
items.simplified_description: All-you-can-eat roast beef with sides including coleslaw, potatoes, carrots, and buns.
items.other_info: Buffet-style with serving staff; spicy horseradish included

items.name: Prime Rib Dinner
items.description: "AAA" Alberta Prime Rib, carefully aged and slowly roasted to perfection, then carved on-site. Served with Caesar salad, baked potatoes with butter, sour cream, and fresh chives, honey-glazed carrots, freshly baked dinner buns, au jus, and extra hot horseradish. China plates, stainless cutlery, and the staff to serve and clean-up are included at no additional charge.
items.simplified_description: Roasted Alberta prime rib with salad, potatoes, carrots, buns, and horseradish.
items.other_info: Includes serving staff and clean-up; spicy horseradish included

items.name: Oven-Roasted Turkey Dinner
items.description: Enjoy our classic oven-roasted turkey accompanied by cranberry relish and turkey gravy. This meal is served with garlic rosemary roasted potatoes, honey-glazed carrots, oven-baked stuffing, garden salad with a balsamic vinaigrette, and freshly baked dinner buns. The staff to serve the buffet and clean-up, China plates, and stainless cutlery are all included.
items.simplified_description: Oven-roasted turkey with sides including potatoes, carrots, stuffing, salad, and buns.

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: _Add another salad to any meal for $3.50 per person plus GST & service charge (18%)._ All ingredients for our salads are combined just moments before the serving time to ensure a fresh, crisp presentation. Offered as all you can eat.
